text.title: AI-Pair Onboarding Script Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ai-pair-onboarding-script. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Each new engineer reads onboarding doc differently; team AGENTS.md is never planted; 3 engineers operate with stale local copies.
antipattern.root-cause: No scripted bootstrap; doc-as-process is fragile.
antipattern.fix: Run this script in the new-hire orientation checklist; rerun on every quarterly sync.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer copies `.claude/settings.json` from a personal repo with `allowedTools: ['*']`.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects wildcard; suggests the team's canonical scope set.

antipattern.symptom: API key misconfigured; engineer discovers only when starting their first real task.
antipattern.fix: Make smoke step a hard gate of `ready_to_pair`.
